tags.name: `mc-hint`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component for displaying hint messages in forms and other user inputs.
Category: Forms
When to use: When you need to provide additional context or guidance related to form fields or user input.
When not to use: When the information is already clear and does not require additional hints.
Works with components: mc-checkbox-group, mc-date-picker, mc-file-upload, mc-input-date, mc-input-time, mc-input, mc-multi-select, mc-number-stepper, mc-radio-group, mc-select-native, mc-select, mc-switch-group, mc-textarea, mc-typeahead-multi-select, mc-typeahead
Alternative component names: Hint Message, Form Hint

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the hint message. Used to display custom text/icon

Attributes:

  * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint text to be shown.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the hint.

  * `visible` {`boolean`} - True, either The hint slot is not empty, or the hint prop has a value.

Properties:

  * `hasSlotHint` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hintNodes` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint text to be shown.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the hint.

  * `visible` {`boolean`} - True, either The hint slot is not empty, or the hint prop has a value.

attributes.name: hint
attributes.description:
`hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint text to be shown.

Property: hint

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the hint.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: visible
attributes.description:
`visible` {`boolean`} - True, either The hint slot is not empty, or the hint prop has a value.

Property: visible

Default: false
